tagline: Precision oncology targeting tumor-specific epitopes to eliminate on-target/off-tumor toxicity
founders: Dr. Aaron Ring (Fred Hutch), Dr. Aashish Manglik (UCSF)
what: Stipple Bio's Pointillist Platform identifies tumor-specific cell-surface targets for next-generation Antibody Drug Conjugates. Lead asset STP-100 is designed to spare healthy tissue and is on track for clinical trials in early 2027.
why: Oversubscribed $100m Series A backed by RA Capital, a16z Bio+Health, and Nextech reflects exceptional investor conviction. Top-institution founders from Fred Hutch and UCSF bring world-class oncology science to a critical ADC specificity problem.
signal: UCSF + Fred Hutch co-founders; oversubscribed Series A led by a16z Bio+Health & RA Capital

tagline: Trusted operating system for deploying and governing autonomous AI agents in the enterprise
what: Sycamore builds the governance and security layer enterprises need to safely deploy autonomous AI agents at scale. The platform already has Fortune 500 early customers running agent workloads.
why: The largest seed in the AI agent infrastructure category signals category-defining potential. Founder Sri Viswanath brings rare combination of CTO operator credibility (Atlassian) and investor pattern recognition (Coatue), with backing from Coatue and Lightspeed.
signal: Ex-Atlassian CTO founder; $65m seed led by Coatue & Lightspeed; Fortune 500 early customers

tagline: AI-native product design platform that works directly from your codebase and design system
what: Noon lets designers create product interfaces directly from the company's live codebase and design system, collapsing the design-to-engineering handoff. The platform bridges historically siloed workflows between product, design, and engineering teams.
why: The largest stealth raise in design-tech history, backed by design leaders from Stripe, OpenAI, Apple, and Meta, points to a genuine category gap. First Round Capital's participation alongside Chemistry adds durable institutional conviction.

tagline: Extrahepatic RNA therapeutics platform targeting rare diseases beyond the liver

why: Oversubscribed Series A in a technically difficult space validates platform differentiation. Solving extrahepatic delivery unlocks a massive rare-disease market that hepatic-only RNA players cannot access, and the dual US/China team accelerates global development.

tagline: Open-source framework for building, testing, and deploying production AI agents

why: Ex-SpaceX pedigree paired with a novel propulsion approach addresses a real operational gap in satellite mobility. National security tailwinds and Booz Allen participation signal dual-use demand that creates a durable, non-commoditized revenue base.

tagline: AI tax-prep automation that cuts CPA time per return by 50% while keeping humans in the loop

Targets wheat, maize, potato, canola.

tagline: Smart, programmable mRNA medicines that activate only in disease cells
founders: Jim Collins (MIT Professor, one of the world's most cited bioengineers, co-inventor of synthetic gene circuits); Eerik Kaseniit (CSO); Sophia Lugo (CEO)
what: Radar builds mRNA therapeutics with proprietary RNA sensors that gate payload expression based on the specific molecular environment inside a target cell. Medicines only activate where specific RNA signatures are detected. Applicable across oncology, neurodegeneration, and immunology.

what: Origin Bio built Axis, the first AI model that both generates regulatory DNA elements and predicts their function. Outperforms Google DeepMind's AlphaGenome at predicting regulatory element activity by 6.7%. Enables programmable gene expression switches for cell and gene therapies.

tagline: Evolutionary therapies for autoimmune disease, inspired by parasites
founders: Adair Borges, Dennis Sun, Emily Weiss ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” three PhDs trained at UCSF, UCSD, and UC Berkeley with 40+ combined years in computational biology, host-parasite interactions, and AI protein structure prediction
what: Ditto Bio discovers drugs for autoimmune diseases by mining the biochemical toolkit of parasites (ticks, worms, viruses) that have evolved over millions of years to suppress the very immune pathways that go haywire in autoimmune conditions. 1M+ proteins analyzed, thousands of candidates identified.

what: Biomarx builds a kit-based automated genomic diagnostic platform for next-generation sequencing cancer detection. First test targets non-small cell lung cancer using circulating tumour DNA from a blood draw, cutting turnaround from 3+ weeks to days at a fraction of centralized-lab cost.

what: AMI Labs is building world models ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” AI systems that reason about physical reality and causality grounded in the physical world rather than predicting the next text token. LeCun's bet is that JEPA (joint embedding predictive architectures) are the right path to genuine reasoning, not transformers trained on internet text.
why: One of the field's founding scientists publicly disagreeing with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google and putting $1B behind an alternative. Whether right or wrong, AMI will generate pivotal research and draw top global talent. Europe's largest seed round ever.
